{{Quote|The monster has one less head.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Dathomir''', also known as the '''Battle of Singing Mountain''',<ref name="CTD">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref> was a battle between the [[Singing Mountain Clan]], [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] alliance and [[Zsinj's Empire]] and their allies, the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]]. This battle resulted in the deaths of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], the most powerful of the post-[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Endor]] warlords, and [[Gethzerion]], leader of the Nightsisters.

==The Battle==
Prior to the battle, Zsinj demanded that the Nightsisters hand over [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], or he would activate the world-killing [[orbital nightcloak]] which could reduce a planet to a ball of frozen ice. After learning that the Nightsisters' assault on the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] had failed, a disappointed Zsinj activated the nightcloak to encourage Gethzerion's cooperation.

The skies grew dark and the planet's temperatures fell dramatically. The Nightsister then agreed to capture Solo, though she also requested a ship for transportation off Dathomir. The witches had planned to travel into [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] space and cause secession in support of the ruthless warlord. In return, Zsinj would send two shuttles - an armed transport for Han Solo, and an unarmed transport for the Nightsisters.

After Solo's capture, he was brought to the Imperial prison where Zsinj's transports had just landed. However, Gethzerion then betrayed Zsinj and murdered all the Imperials. Han Solo was saved by the timely arrival of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] (with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] simultaneously operating all of its crew stations via [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]), though Gethzerion and her cohorts had escaped onboard the armed shuttle. With Luke in hot pursuit and using radio communication jamming to attract the attention of Zsinj's Star Destroyers the shuttle was destroyed.

Despite Gethzerion's death, the orbital nightcloak still remained in effect and the planet was blockaded by Zsinj's fleet. However, the ''Millennium Falcon'' managed to disable the nightcloak and the Hapan fleet arrived to engage the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] and the other vessels of Zsinj's Empire. During the battle, the Hapans destroyed the orbital nightcloak and mined the surrounding space with [[pulse mass mine]]s to prevent the Imperials from fleeing into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. This was dangerous since it stranded both the attacker and the target in real space for several minutes. The ''Falcon'' succeeded in destroying the shields and bridge of the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']], killing the warlord and thereby removing a major threat to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
